summary: Critical gaps: (1) No test files provided—TDD requirement unfulfilled. (2) No test harness or assertions; workflow runs script but doesn't verify output or parse results as required by task. (3) Missing label-config.json fixture—script will fail at runtime. (4) No act-result.txt artifact created (required by task). (5) Actions not pinned to SHA (best practice violation): checkout@v4, setup-bun@v2 should use 40-char commit hashes. (6) Workflow lacks actual testing steps—just executes script with hardcoded defaults. Code itself (types, assignLabels logic) is reasonably typed and error-aware, but unverified. Not shippable.
